title: puccinellia iberica
intro: Puccinellia iberica, also known as sea bent or sea grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, Puccinellia iberica has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and enhancing the immune system. Puccinellia iberica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
